title: Fix authentication timeout
description: Users getting logged out after 5 minutes. JWT refresh not triggering. Check the token expiry handling in AuthService and fix the refresh interval. Acceptance criteria: users stay logged in for at least 1 hour of activity, refresh token is called before expiry, add unit tests for the refresh logic.

title: Add user profile page
description: Full-stack feature: backend API + frontend page + tests. Backend needs GET/PUT /api/profile. Frontend needs ProfileComponent with settings form.

team.description: Add GET /api/profile and PUT /api/profile endpoints. Return/accept: { name: string, email: string, avatar_url: string, preferences: { theme: 'light' | 'dark', notifications: boolean } }. Add ProfileService with validation. Unit tests for service and controller.

Add ProfileComponent at /profile route. Call GET /api/profile on load, PUT /api/profile on save. Form fields: name, email (readonly), avatar (upload), theme (toggle), notifications (toggle). API contract: { name: string, email: string, avatar_url: string, preferences: { theme: 'light' | 'dark', notifications: boolean } }.

title: Security audit on auth module
description: Review auth middleware for OWASP top 10 vulnerabilities. Check token validation, session handling, CSRF protection, input sanitization. Report findings with severity ratings.
